feed.title: SAP Community - BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)
feed.subtitle: BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BEx unit conversion from KG to TO
entry.content:
Hi,

I am having an issue when converting gross produced weight into TONNES via BEx unit conversion, but seemingly only when converting materials that have their gross weight already in KG.

The result for these materials is 1000x smaller than it should be. But others are OK.

I am using a calculated key figure to get the produced weight in normal weight units from material master with formula variable replacement path.

I multiply it with GR quantity that is wrapped in NODIM function so I don't get results like "KGPC".

Aggregation is set to summation by material.

This calculated key figure is then placed in the columns and the 0KGFIX is used for unit conversion. This works fine, since it is standard and is using T006 table.

The same calculated value is also in the columns, but with conversion type ZTNFIX:

In RSUOM it is visible, that it is using the T006 table.

The target unit is set to TO.

TO unit is present in T006 as well as KG.

What is causing this?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP variables technical names got updated automatically for OLAP query in MII
entry.content: In SAP MII we are using some OLAP queries to extract data from BI cubes. In the OLAP query some parameters are passed as SAP variables from MII, in these variables a few are standard SAP names and are shown the same name in BI BEx query and MII OLAP query template. The issue is that some of these variables are custom made for MII and the name shown in MII OLAP query template is different than shown in BI side (Ex: in pattern MII-- [!V000012]) but in BI it has some other defined name. When some unrelated change happened and BI cube got updated the said SAP variable names shown for MII got changed automatically, because of the last two digits are changing. But other standard variables are not changing. Now I wanted to understand how these naming is generated for SAP MII OLAP templates, how it is getting changed.

entry.title: Create Variable for 0HIER_VERS
entry.content:
Hi,

in a Query i want to select the hierarchy version by customer exit variable.

i tried to create a variable on 0HIER_VERS but this is a technical Infoobject and i can't add it to a provider to make it visible in query designer.

i also tried using Infoobject 0H_VERSION but variables on this object aren't visible as variables in version selection of the hierarchy.

Does anyone knows how to create a variable for the hierarchy version?

entry.title: BEx query formula
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently working on a BEx query-based Analysis workspace report. In the report layout, we have "three formulae" that are combinations of "other formulas" that are combinations of "Selections". All of the other formulas are set to Hide (can be shown) option. In the report layout, we have one characteristic and three formulas set as default. We have one characteristic and 3 formulas added as default in the report layout. The problem is that only if we include an independent key figure in the report in addition to the three formulas do all of the documents pass through the report; otherwise, part of the documents are missing. Please be aware that existing conditions in the report have been disabled. What could be the underlying reason for this type of behavior? Please share your thoughts.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP BW on MAC M1 - Network is only supported in WinGUI
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We have installed SAP GUI 7.70 Revision 9 for java on MACOS with M1 processor for running SAP BW in SAP GUI. We can't open some features in BW, like transformations, because of the following error:

'' Network is only supported in WinGUI.

Diagnosis

The network ActiveX Control only runs in the Windows GUI.Java GUI and Web GUI are not supported''.

We want to have MAC with M1 processor the SAP Analysis for office, with connection to BW and through the SAP GUI for JAVA the network functions of BW, such as transformations, transfer rules, update rules, process chains monitor.

Is there any way to solve this issue?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Bex Reports not working in BO 4.1 system after Oracle upgrade to 19c
entry.content:
We have updated the Oracle database from 11 to 19c and after that Bex reports taking huge time to execute and getting timeout error and the BW system is 7.3.

The reports created on top of Infoset and sometime report executed fast and sometime getting below timeout error also we have noticed when we executing the system is utilizing temp table space heavily.

Kindly help me to find out what is causing this issue.

entry.title: How to publish query as a web service in the SAP BW system？
entry.content: How to publish query as a web service in the SAP BW system？

entry.title: Hierarchy update
entry.content:
Hi friends,


i am working x company, where we have different approach in hierarchy. We used to get mdms where we need to maintain hierarchy manually like if we have company code ch00 and line business is l1,l2,…..l20. We need to maintain in each node like l1 node we have to insert ch00l1. here my question is how to automate it?


Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Fiori App: F0949 (Cost Centers Plant/Actual) - Change filter setup in BEX does not reflect in App
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

On the Fiori App F0949 (Cost Centers Plant/Actual), the is a filter for the GL Account / GL Account Group which only allows single values.

Found that this App is based on a Bex Query, so using Bex Designer we changed the variable tied to this filter, and set a Select-Option type.

After doing that, running the Query on RSRT we can see this filter now allows multiple and interval selection, however the filter has DISSAPEARED from the Fiori APP:

Before:

After:

Do somebody know if we are missing something? Have you ever experienced this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Unable to get the full Text in AFO
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

In AFO, member section even after choosing the key and Text, the full text is not reflecting. In text the key value is coming.

As in the SAP system, the text value for Customer grp3 in AGC is AGCC,

Also in the Bex I choose key and Tex

Please provide me with solution.

Regards,
Saima Afreen

entry.title: Import P12 keypair in java instance fails
entry.content:
while trying to import a p12 keypair into java instance ssl keystore , I get this error :

java.security.KeyStoreException: ID21108: java.lang.ClassCastException: [Liaik.asn1.ASN1Object; (loaded by com.sap.engine.boo

t.loader.ResourceMultiParentClassLoader@0x0000000800069f30) cannot be cast to [B

any hint ?

Thx

regards

Bernd

entry.title: SAP BW DocumentStore of Authorization Object
entry.content:
Hi BW Experts,

Currently I am working on SAP DocumentStore where we can create/Edit and Delete the Comments for the keyfigure in Bex reporting. I am in the Process of creating the roles for end users. Right now, there are 3 types of activities that user has to perform.

Activity 1 : User 1 can view only the Comments. This can be achieved by using the Auth Object S_RS_DOCA and selected the activity as 33 - Read. It is working fine for this requirement.

Activity 2 : User 2 can View and Edit Comments and he should not delete the comments. As of now, there are 4 activities for S_RS_DOCA.

1. Display

2. Maintain

3. Read

4. Write

By checking the activity Read and Write, the system allows to modify and also Deleting the comment. I want to restrict the deletion of comments by this user. Please let me know, how to achieve this requirement.

Activity 3 : User 3 can View, Edit and delete the comments. This is achieved by enabling the activities Read and Write. As of now, it is working fine.

Thanks.

entry.title: Business explorer anlayzer logon error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need help with my issue logging into business explorer analyzer and I am getting an error message pop up saying 'SAP Logon Control' and the details are below and I need to access to this anlyzer....

Can anyone here help me on this issue ?

System.Runtime.InteropServices.COMException (0x8007007F): Retrieving the COM class factory for component with CLSID {B24944D6-1501-11CF-8981-0000E8A49FA0} failed due to the following error: 8007007f The specified procedure could not be found. (Exception from HRESULT: 0x8007007F).

at System.RuntimeTypeHandle.CreateInstance(RuntimeType type, Boolean publicOnly, Boolean noCheck, Boolean& canBeCached, RuntimeMethodHandleInternal& ctor, Boolean& bNeedSecurityCheck)

at System.RuntimeType.CreateInstanceSlow(Boolean publicOnly, Boolean skipCheckThis, Boolean fillCache, StackCrawlMark& stackMark)

at System.RuntimeType.CreateInstanceDefaultCtor(Boolean publicOnly, Boolean skipCheckThis, Boolean fillCache, StackCrawlMark& stackMark)

at System.Activator.CreateInstance(Type type, Boolean nonPublic)

at System.Activator.CreateInstance(Type type)

at SAP.LogonControlEx.LogonControl_Wrapper.CreateCOMLogonControlInstance()

at SAP.LogonControlEx.LogonControl_Wrapper.SetNewConnection()

at SAP.LogonControlEx.LogonControl_Wrapper.NewConnection()

at SAP.LogonControlEx.LogonControl_Wrapper.DisplayR3SystemList(Int64 hWnd, RfcConfigParameters& rfcConfigParam, Boolean isSilent, Int32 displayDialogMode, String strSystemID)

entry.title: data loading failure
entry.content:
Hi Pro,

we have data loading into ADSO failed with following error message. there is no detail info here or in job log. just repair the step will fix the issue, but what is the reason for this failure?

entry.title: How to Change / Manipulate Result Row in BEX query
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am new to bex query. I have the below requirement. For the Overall result column marked in (red) below, I need to display the sum of previous result columns (in this example its 100 + 90 = 190). Is this possible in Bex Query, Kindly advice please. Many Thanks in Advance.

Note: The result row for City Key Figure 1 / 3 result displays the Max value for City. The Final result row displays the Last value for KF1 and Max for KF3. I need this to be Sum of Previous result rows pls..

Any Queries kindly revert.

Best Regards,

Siva

entry.title: Bex Query Performance Enhancement for BW on HANA
entry.content:
My Requirement is to present an Approch for
Bex Query Performance Enhancement for BW on HANA Composite Providers

Please let me know if there any documents which we submit as a presentation .
I read few topics but not sure what should be priority which give good performance


Regards,
Naiduz

entry.title: Installing SAP Crystal Reports 2020 unto toolbox using Visual Studio 2022
entry.content: I have SAP Crystal Reports 2020 installed. I also have Visual Studio 2022 installed. I would like to use SAP Crystal Reports in the Visual Studio ToolBox. I can not get this to install.

entry.title: Schedule line date changed
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone please answer on this?

We have created MTO sales order on 31.01.2024 that time production order was not confirmed so system shows  requested delivery date to 07.02.2024, but very same day night  production order was confirmed and released and on 01.02.2024 GR done, but as per schedule line 07.02.2024 the loading date, transport planning date, material availability date should be 06.02.2024 but when production confirmed Via IT BATCH all the schedule line loading,planning, material availability date changed to 01.02.2024? Can anyone explain why IT BATCH has changed the date when scheduled date is 07.02.2024 and planning date is 06.02.2024 in sales order?

REQUESTED DELIVERY DATE WHEN ORDER NOT CONFIRMED -07.02.2024

LOADING DATE - 06.02.2024

TRANSPORTAION PLANNING DATE - 06.02.2024

MATERIAL AVAILABILITY DATE - 06.02.2024

But via IT BATCH it has automatically changed to 01.02.2024.

entry.title: Enter valid tax code
entry.content:
There is already an entry with the same key information error

I'm trying to enter my tax code but receiving these errors while creating a CR, please help

entry.title: How to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable?
entry.content:
Helli Everyone,

I have a requirement that to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable. In cube we have data as below.

Version 700 data in cube

OpCoVersionYCALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland70012.2023202312150
poland70012.202320241160
poland70012.202320242170

Version 100 data in cube

OpCoVersion0CALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland10012.2023202312180
poland1001.202420241190

In the bex query created a YCALMONTH based variable of manual input. If user enters 12.2023 as YCALMONTH, it means we are having 0CALYEAR's are 2023 and 2024 for YCALMONTH.

In for V100 if we have 2023 and 2024 as 0CALYEAR.

Question: In LY column how to pass 0calyear's based on ycalmonth's - 0calyear's on cube using customer exit variable?

 

Report
columns - 0CALYEAR2023 20242024
columns - version700100700100
rows - CYLYCYLY
 150180160190
   170 

So, how to write a customer exit variable to fetch 0calyear's of specific ycalmonth on cube and those 0calyear's: 2023, 2024 in V100 to pass to a variable.
BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing

BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)
